title: Creamy Cheese and Chicken Enchiladas
ingredients: 1/2 cup chopped green onion, plus 2 tbsp. for garnish
3 cups cooked, shredded chicken breasts (2 large, whole chicken breasts)
Dash or two of cayenne pepper
instructions: Add flour and whisk until well blended with butter.
Cook flour/butter mixture 2 minutes while stirring.
Slowly add chicken broth while whisking.
Add salt, cumin, and cayenne pepper.
Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until sauce thickens.
Stir in sour cream and green chiles.
Spread 1/2 cup of the sauce on the bottom of a 9x13 inch glass pan.
Fill each tortilla with approximately 1/3 cup cheese, 1/3 cup chicken, and 1 tbsp. green onion.
Roll each tortilla and place in the glass pan.
Pour remaining sauce on top of enchiladas.
Sprinkle 2 tbsp. green onions down the center of enchiladas.
notes: This is one of Grandma Carol's recipes
